rules.name: Description-Damage Mismatch
rules.description: Accident description does not match visible damage location/type

rules.name: Severity Inflation
rules.description: Claimed severity far exceeds what is visible in photos

rules.name: Pre-existing Damage
rules.description: Damage shows signs of age, rust, or previous repair inconsistent with recent accident

rules.name: Estimate Inflation
rules.description: Repair estimate significantly exceeds market rate for the damage described

rules.name: Policy Timing Suspicious
rules.description: Major claim filed within 30 days of policy inception

rules.name: Multiple Claims Pattern
rules.description: More than 2 claims in 12 months for same vehicle

rules.name: Vague Accident Description
rules.description: Accident description lacks specific details (location, time, circumstances)

rules.name: Unrelated Parts Claimed
rules.description: Parts claimed do not correspond to the type of accident described

rules.name: No FIR Filed
rules.description: High-value claim without police FIR when legally required

rules.name: Witness Inconsistency
rules.description: Witness accounts contradict the claimant's description

rules.name: Total Loss on Old Vehicle
rules.description: Total loss claim on vehicle near end of depreciation life

rules.name: Airbag Without Impact Damage
rules.description: Airbag deployment claimed without corresponding major impact damage

rules.name: Image Metadata Manipulation
rules.description: Photo EXIF data suggests images not taken at claimed date/location

rules.name: Duplicate Claim
rules.description: Similar claim filed with another insurer for same incident

rules.name: Repair Bill Discrepancy
rules.description: Repair bills show different amounts or parts than surveyor assessment
